nodes.name: Flame-eared honeyeater
nodes.summary: The flame-eared honeyeater (Lichmera flavicans), also known as the yellow-eared honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found on Timor island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The flame-eared honeyeater (Lichmera flavicans), also known as the yellow-eared honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae…

nodes.name: Lichmera
nodes.summary: Lichmera（Lichmera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Scaly-crowned honeyeater、Olive honeyeater、Brown honeyeater等10种鸟类。
